title: Documentation, Change, Lifecycle, and Monitoring · Protocol Clinic: Net Snmp
summary: Operate a living network source of truth with baselines, telemetry, alerts, configuration, and service ownership. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net snmp increment in an operations and observability runbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use SNMP v2c or v3, MIBs, polling, traps, community or user security, and management scope appropriately.
Use request, impact, approval, schedule, backup, baseline, golden configuration, rollback, verification, and review controls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
